calendar.matters:
MOTION To Enforce Settlement Against West Bay Builders, Inc. And Paul Thompson
Off Calendar Feb-05-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- defendant and cross-complainant SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT's motion to enforece settlement against West Bay Builders, Inc. and Paul Thompson is granted - district is entitled to all contract balances and retention it held on date of agreement i.e. $586,909.40. District shall be provided with adequate security for remaining balance due - $200,000.00 payment bond is adequate security. (JJM/MD) Karen Farnsworth, CSR 5162 (925/833-7107)
* * * Clerical error -- ruling vacated -- Per David L. Norman, Deputy City Attorney (554-3989) this matter was taken off calendar prior to today.
